title: Clamp fins_vues + total_runs to maxi(0) in load_profile()
description: SPECIALIST-9: load_profile() clamps meta['anam'] to maxi(0) at line 147 but does NOT clamp fins_vues or total_runs. A tampered save with fins_vues=-999 would pass _validate() (is numeric) but give incorrect arc condition results (fins_vues >= 5 check would never fire). Fix: after line 151 (faction_rep clamp), add: meta['fins_vues'] = maxi(int(meta.get('fins_vues', 0)), 0) and meta['total_runs'] = maxi(int(meta.get('total_runs', 0)), 0). Consistent with existing anam clamp pattern.
notes: Implemented: added fins_vues and total_runs maxi(0) clamps in load_profile() clamping block (merlin_save_system.gd:148-149). Also added trust_merlin clampi(0,100) as SAVE-TRUST-CLAMP HIGH finding.

title: Fix RAG context: pass brain_role='narrator' and raise substr limit to 800-token budget
description: SPEC-8: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:305-307 calls rag_mgr.get_prioritized_context(context) without brain_role AND truncates to 200 chars. FIX: (1) Pass brain_role='narrator' to use 800-token budget. (2) Replace substr(0,200) with substr(0,3200) to allow up to 800 tokens (~3200 chars) of RAG context. RAGManager already enforces the budget internally — the substr was an unnecessary double-truncation.
notes: Fixed: pass brain_role=narrator to get_prioritized_context() + removed substr(0,200) cap. Narrator budget 800 tokens (3200 chars) vs previous 50 tokens.

title: Test: LLM pipeline integration — brain fallback chain and timeout handling
description: Verify: fallback card used on Ollama timeout, poll_result() correct, cancel_generation() clean, generate_async error on double-call.
notes: SPEC-9 bug_hunter static analysis: 5 invariants checked. PASS: fallback card, brain busy cleanup, cancel safety, double-call guard. WARN_LOW: stale _pending_callback race in cancel_generation(). New task LLM-CANCEL-STALE-CALLBACK added.

title: Fix RAG context: pass brain_role='narrator' and remove 200-char substr cap
description: AUDIT-8 LLM-AUD-005: merlin_llm_adapter.gd:305 calls rag_mgr.get_prioritized_context(context) without brain_role='narrator'. Gets 400-token (~1600 char) default instead of 800-token (~3200 char) narrator budget. FIX: Pass brain_role='narrator' as second arg. Also verify no explicit substr cap after the call (RAG manager handles budget internally).
notes: Fixed: pass brain_role=narrator to get_prioritized_context() + removed substr(0,200) cap. Narrator budget 800 tokens (3200 chars) vs previous 50 tokens.

title: Clamp trust_merlin to 0-100 in load_profile()
description: SPEC-9 HIGH: trust_merlin validated as numeric but not clamped — tampered save trust_merlin=999 gives T3 content (>80 threshold). Fixed inline with SAVE-FINS-VUES-CLAMP: added clampi(trust_merlin,0,100) to load_profile() clamping block.
notes: Implemented in same commit as SAVE-FINS-VUES-CLAMP
